# thoth_policy_exception_review (Resource)

Submits a review decision for a policy exception request.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "thoth_policy_exception_review" "crm_export_review" {
  request_id         = thoth_policy_exception.crm_export.request_id
  review_decision    = "approve"
  reviewed_by        = "usec-ops"
  review_notes       = "Approved with temporary override while policy patch rolls out"
  owner              = "security-platform"
  target_environment = "prod"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `request_id` (String) Policy exception request ID.
- `review_decision` (String) Review outcome: approve, deny, request_changes, approve_with_modification.
- `reviewed_by` (String) Reviewer identity.

### Optional

- `owner` (String) Optional owner metadata used when synthesizing policy artifacts.
- `override_expires_at` (String) Optional runtime override expiration timestamp (RFC3339).
- `policy_change_json` (String) Optional policy change override JSON payload.
- `review_notes` (String) Optional review notes.
- `target_environment` (String) Optional target environment (for example prod or staging).

### Read-Only

- `applied_policy_change_json` (String) Policy change metadata present on the reviewed exception.
- `id` (String) Resource ID (request ID).
- `status` (String) Resulting policy exception status.
- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant ID from provider configuration.
- `updated_at` (String) Updated timestamp after review.
